yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_GhostSocks_Turns_Victim_Systems_Into_Res {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for GhostSocks Turns Victim Systems Into Residential Proxies for Evasive Cyberattack"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "GhostSocks" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE20265179__SourceCodester_Simple_Docto {

        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"

        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-5179" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "SourceCodester" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 115 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 100 as HIGH risk. 43 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, UNC-CDB-99, CDB-CYB-01. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
